title: OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL AND DRUG TREATMENT AND DUII SERVICES REHABILITATION AND EDUCATION - 211info
text: TERAS COUNSELING INC OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL AND DRUG TREATMENT AND DUII SERVICES REHABILITATION AND EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers outpatient treatment for self referred alcohol and substance use disorders and is state approved to provide court ordered DUII diversion or convicted status services. 3945 SE Hawthorne Boulevard Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Adults 18 years and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-8:45pm, Saturday 10am-5pm by appointment Regular intake sessions: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Saturday 4pm Email (503) 719-5250 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 719-5250 FAX (503) 715-5672 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to schedule intake appointment or call for more information FEES: Group and individual therapy sessions: Accepts Oregon Health Plan HealthShare, Open Card and Trillium CCOs, as well as other private insurances. Payment plans and other funding may be available. DOCUMENTS: Contact information for primary care physician, referral sources, and other treatment services. Insurance information if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties. Accommodates court mandates from anywhere in the state and some out of state jurisdictions SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8:45pm, Saturday 10am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Available by TriMet bus lines 14 and 75 Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: CRIMINAL CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM - DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PERPETRATOR INTERVENTION PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ANGER MANAGEMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TERAS COUNSELING INC
